reasoning: Order #000000600 is complete and fully paid ($152.27). Customer claims they received a different product than ordered. There is no evidence contradicting the claim in the order record, and the customer has a long purchase history with returns limited to size exchanges (no fraud indicators). To meet SLA and maintain customer satisfaction, approve the refund and issue a credit memo. Recommend providing size/product consultation to reduce future issues.
